SMA Trend Regime Simulator

Interactive trigger map and transaction simulator for QQQ leveraged switching

🟢 Time spent in TQQQ (Strong Bull)

Preset:

📊
What are these lines?
The 50-day average (dashed blue) tracks the short-term price momentum, while the 200-day average (orange) is the line in the sand separating bull and bear markets.
🟢
TQQQ (3x Speed)
When prices are above both averages, the market is in a strong uptrend. We buy TQQQ to try to capture 3x the daily returns of QQQ.
🟡
QLD (2x Speed)
When price falls below the short-term average but holds the 200-day average, we de-risk into QLD to safely weather temporary pullbacks.
🔴
QQQ (1x Safe)
If prices plunge below the 200-day average, we exit all leverage and hold regular QQQ to protect our nest egg from devastating corrections.
